title: mirabilis hirsuta
intro: Mirabilis hirsuta, also known as hairy four o'clock, is a species of flowering plant in the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae) native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mirabilis hirsuta include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
